# Project Buildup History: Lead Management Product Launch

- Repository: `lead-management-product-launch`
- Category: `product_case_study`
- Subtype: `prediction`
- Source: `project_buildup_2021_2025_daily_plan_extra.csv`
## 2024-08-05 - Day 4: Funnel analysis

- Task summary: Returned to the Lead Management Product Launch case study to do a proper funnel analysis. The conversion rates at each stage of the lead funnel had been calculated but not contextualized against industry benchmarks. Added a benchmark comparison section using published B2B SaaS conversion norms. The most notable gap was at the MQL-to-SQL stage which was underperforming even compared to the low end of the benchmark range. That became the focus for the intervention recommendation.
- Deliverable: Funnel benchmarked against industry norms. MQL-to-SQL gap identified as primary opportunity.
## 2024-08-05 - Day 4: Funnel analysis

- Task summary: Quick fix: the funnel visualization was not handling the case where stage volume inverted between MQL and SQL (more SQLs than MQLs in one cohort). Added a note and a clamp to prevent negative bar widths.
- Deliverable: Funnel chart edge case fixed for inverted stage volumes.
